name: Cloud 66 API
description: Cloud 66 is a DevOps-as-a-Service platform that helps developers build, deploy, and manage applications on any cloud. The API provides programmatic access to manage stacks, servers, services, containers, deployments, environment variables, settings, backups, accounts, and more.
